title: Claude Fable 5 & Apple’s NVIDIA deal
summary: IBM Technology's Mixture of Experts podcast discusses Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 release, its tier routing system, Apple's announced shift to cloud-based AI via NVIDIA partnership at WWDC 2026, and the capability of AI models to detect sarcasm through multimodal inputs versus context alone.
writeup: This Mixture of Experts episode, hosted by Tim Hwang on IBM Technology, covers three topics: Claude Fable 5's tier routing system, Apple's shift away from on-device AI toward an NVIDIA cloud compute partnership announced at WWDC 2026, and whether AI models can detect sarcasm. The Apple discussion matters because it marks a move from local inference toward cloud compute infrastructure for AI workloads. On the sarcasm question, the panel debates whether multimodal inputs are required or whether context alone is sufficient, touching on multimodal learning and test-time routing along the way.
